trajectory.model_output:
<python_code>
import numpy as np

# Get the grasp pose for the red cube
grasp_position, grasp_quaternion = sample_grasp_pose("red cube")

# Approach 10 cm above the grasp position to avoid collision
z_approach_distance = 0.10

# Move to the approach pose above the red cube
goto_pose(grasp_position, grasp_quaternion, z_approach=z_approach_distance)

# Lower to the actual grasp position and close the gripper
goto_pose(grasp_position, grasp_quaternion)
close_gripper()

# Lift the red cube by moving upward in Z-axis by 10 cm
lift_position = grasp_position + np.array([0.0, 0.0, 0.10])
goto_pose(lift_position, grasp_quaternion)
</python_code>

metadata.tool_input:
import numpy as np

# Get the grasp pose for the red cube
grasp_position, grasp_quaternion = sample_grasp_pose("red cube")

# Approach 10 cm above the grasp position to avoid collision
z_approach_distance = 0.10

# Move to the approach pose above the red cube
goto_pose(grasp_position, grasp_quaternion, z_approach=z_approach_distance)

# Lower to the actual grasp position and close the gripper
goto_pose(grasp_position, grasp_quaternion)
close_gripper()

# Lift the red cube by moving upward in Z-axis by 10 cm
lift_position = grasp_position + np.array([0.0, 0.0, 0.10])
goto_pose(lift_position, grasp_quaternion)
